translation.en: I always hope for the future.

notes_md:
**hi vọng** = to hope. It’s when you want something good to happen and believe it’s possible.

It’s a **verb**, often followed by a clause about the future.  

Very often used with future words like **sẽ**. You can also say **hi vọng vào + noun** (to place hope in something).

Close synonym: **mong** (a bit softer, more emotional).  
Standard spelling is **hy vọng** — same meaning, just the more formal/official form.

translation.en: I always hope for the future.

notes:
hi vọng = to hope. It’s when you want something good to happen and believe it’s possible.

It’s a verb, often followed by a clause about the future.  

Very often used with future words like sẽ. You can also say hi vọng vào + noun (to place hope in something).

Close synonym: mong (a bit softer, more emotional).  
Standard spelling is hy vọng — same meaning, just the more formal/official form.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I hope it will be sunny tomorrow so everyone can go out.
She always hopes everything will be better in the future.
I hope the results of this exam will make my parents happy.

example.en: I hope that everything will be fine.
example.vi: Tôi hi vọng rằng mọi thứ sẽ tốt đẹp.

definitions.en: A feeling of expectation and desire for a certain thing to happen.
definitions.es: Un sentimiento de expectativa y deseo de que ocurra algo.
definitions.vi: Cảm giác mong đợi và khao khát một điều gì đó xảy ra.

exampleSentences: Anh hi vọng ngày mai trời sẽ nắng để mọi người đi chơi.
Chị luôn hi vọng mọi thứ sẽ tốt đẹp hơn trong tương lai.
Em hi vọng kết quả kỳ thi lần này sẽ làm bố mẹ vui lòng.
